video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: 洁净车间内部. 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影. 展示运行设备、管道、警示标识, 镜头缓慢平移展示地面通道. Narration: "车间内存在运行设备、管道、气路、水路和电气装置。请不要靠近旋转部件、加热部件和压力管路。不要倚靠设备，不要触碰阀门、按钮、线缆和管道。行走时注意地面，防止滑倒、绊倒和碰撞。". Camera motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up. 洁净车间内部，运行中的机械设备，管道和阀门，黄色警示标识，地面有防滑通道标记，明亮冷光，工业安全氛围. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
video_prompt_keywords: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识, 明亮白光，工业照明，无影, 展示运行设备、管道、警示标识, 镜头缓慢平移展示地面通道, 洁净车间内部，运行中的机械设备，管道和阀门，黄色警示标识，地面有防滑通道标记，明亮冷光，工业安全氛围

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱线缆, 溢出液体, 敞开门, 无标识区域, 人员遮挡，设备静止，光线昏暗, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: static wide establishing shot, slow dolly in from medium to close-up

structured_context.scene_lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影
action_beats: 展示运行设备、管道、警示标识
镜头缓慢平移展示地面通道

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 车间内存在运行设备、管道、气路、水路和电气装置。请不要靠近旋转部件、加热部件和压力管路。不要倚靠设备，不要触碰阀门、按钮、线缆和管道。行走时注意地面，防止滑倒、绊倒和碰撞。

workflow.tool_instructions: Use video prompt + conditioning keyframes for img2vid generation. Copy 'video_prompt' into your video tool, attach 'conditioning_keyframes' as start/end frame conditioning.
